revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Never substitute}}
==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories
{{Other category-header templates}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Tracking templates]] }}</includeonly> <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "A category header template which adds a notice that explains that the category is a [[:Category:Container categories|container category]] which should contain only [[Wikipedia:SUBCAT|subcategories]]." } </templatedata>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories

==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Never substitute}}
==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories
{{Other category-header templates}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Never substitute}}
==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories
{{Other category-header templates}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Never substitute}}
==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories
{{Other category-header templates}}

<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Tracking templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Container_category%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Container_category%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Never substitute}}
==Usage== Tag categories with {{tlx|Container category}} to inform editors that they should not contain anything other than subcategories.
The categories will be added to [[:Category:Container categories]]. If the template is transcluded on a page outside of the category namespace, the page will not be added to [[:Category:Container categories]].
Categories that are part of Wikipedia administration should be tagged with {{tl|Maintenance category}} instead.
==See also== *{{tl2|Category diffuse}} – for noting that included pages should be categorised to the category's sub-categories, if possible *{{tl2|Parent-only stub category}} – a similar template for use in stub categories
{{Other category-header templates}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "A category header template which adds a notice that explains that the category is a [[:Category:Container categories|container category]] which should contain only [[Wikipedia:SUBCAT|subcategories]]." } </templatedata>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Tracking templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
